name: Bluetooth A2DP Speaker (Wireless Audio)
description: Turn ESP32-S3 + speaker into a Bluetooth speaker. Receives audio from phone/PC via A2DP sink profile, outputs via I2S to MAX98357A or PAM8403. No WiFi required — pair and play. Based on pschatzmann/ESP32-A2DP v1.9.2 + arduino-audio-tools.

connected.description: Whether a Bluetooth source is connected
